description: Raw JSON inputs for string canonicalization. Run generate-vectors.mjs to produce ../generated/strings.json.

cases.name: quote and backslash
cases.rationale: RFC 8785 requires backslash escape for quote and backslash

cases.name: control newline
cases.rationale: newline MUST be \n, never raw or \u000a

cases.name: low control unicode
cases.rationale: control chars below 0x20 without named escapes MUST use \uXXXX lowercase hex

cases.name: unicode bmp
cases.rationale: BMP Unicode passed through verbatim — no escaping above 0x20

cases.name: unicode supplementary
cases.rationale: supplementary plane; encoded as surrogate pair in UTF-16, preserved as single UTF-8 sequence

cases.name: forward slash
cases.rationale: RFC 8785 does NOT require escaping forward slashes
